raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I booked a reservation through XXXX XXXXn error. I immediately cancelled and was sent an email that states that I would be receiving a refund in XXXX days. This timeframe as past and I have contact Citi bank to file a dispute on the charge, the representative XXXX, who did not want to process my request to file a dispute told me that XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  of Citi XXXX reputable merchant and i should contact the contact service team after XX/XX/XXXX to try filling my disputes once more. I did and they closed out my dispute with out a proper investigation in favor of their reputable merchant.
